mentions.note: Housing sector showing green shoots; pricing and mortgage rates down; potential 401k home-purchase rule could send homebuilder stocks much higher.
Greenland peace dividend lifts homebuilder; crushed yesterday on tariff/war fears, rallies today on relief.
After dry spell, getting big biotech orders; better managed quarters recently; stock down today could be opportunity. First truly strong quarter in years possible.
Sole home builder showing strength; rate-cut thesis needs more sector support.
Homebuilder down 3.3%; lower-end housing demand weakening; group downgrade impacting.
